name: TOP_ORIGIN_BY_FUNCTION
description: Top origin by functional category. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (o:Origin {name: $origin})<-[:ORIGIN_FROM]-(a:Assignee)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]->(tp:TargetPair)-[:HAS_TARGET]->(t:Target)-[:FUNCTIONED_AS]->(f:Functional_of_Target {name: $functional_of_target})
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count, count(DISTINCT tp) AS targetpair_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, targetpair_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: Which organizations or individuals from EU lead in target-pair combinations involving Platelet_Engagement_Target targets?
Which organizations or individuals from Other lead in target-pair combinations involving Innate_Immune_Activation_Target targets?
Which organizations or individuals from JP lead in target-pair combinations involving NK_Cell_Engagement_Target targets?
